description: EU AI Act Art. 50(2) — the system is being used to process emotional state or biometric categorisation data of natural persons. Triggers the Art. 50(2) notification obligation: deployers must inform natural persons that they are being subject to emotion recognition or biometric categorisation, in accordance with GDPR. NOTE: if the context is a workplace or educational institution, the system is likely prohibited under Art. 5(1)(f) — check the companion pack eu-ai-act-prohibited (intent: emotion_recognition_workplace). Recommended downstream action: inject user-facing notification of emotion/biometric processing before or during the interaction.

en: detect anxiety or distress in message
infer emotional state from voice features
classify user affect from response time
